what_it_does: Records an image attachment entry in the design-source channel, mapping an attachment id to a target image URI and logging its creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata only, with no body content
References an image via a custom image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-15 URI
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
No code symbols or executable content
standouts: Custom image:// URI used as the attachment target
Minimal ledger-style record linking an id to an external image resource
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Employs a custom URI scheme for resource targeting
Keeps the record file-local and neutral
concerns: The image:// target is opaque and not resolvable from this file alone
No title, caption, or description for the image
No checksum or provenance metadata beyond a timestamp
No indication of who or what created the attachment
notes: A minimal channel-attachment ledger entry that maps attachment id att-df7a7e88 to the image resource image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-15.
questions: What does image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-15 resolve to in storage?
What is the pitch-deck/p-15 image and where is its actual file?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is there a corresponding image file or only this reference?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is an attachment registration record and it performs exactly that function.
intention_signals: To create a durable, referenceable link between a channel attachment identifier and an image asset so the image can be retrieved or cited within the design-source channel.
novelty: The use of a custom image:// URI scheme in the target field; otherwise the metadata structure is conventional.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and a target pointer for an image in the design-source channel, supporting lookup and citation without embedding the image itself.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry mapping attachment id att-df7a7e88 in the design-source channel to the image target image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-15 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Register an image attachment in the design-source channel so it can be referenced by id and linked to a specific pitch-deck image resource.
